description_long: This object is a large, curved computer monitor with a sleek, modern design. The display is framed by a thin, black bezel that accentuates the curvature of the screen, providing an immersive viewing experience. The monitor is supported by a robust, angular V-shaped stand made of metallic material, which offers stability and a contemporary aesthetic. The rear of the monitor is smooth and unadorned, with no visible buttons, ports, or branding, emphasizing a minimalist look. The overall color scheme is predominantly black for the screen and bezel, with a contrasting silver or gray stand. The surface finish appears smooth and slightly glossy, reflecting light subtly.
description: A large, curved black computer monitor with a thin bezel and a sturdy metallic V-shaped stand, featuring a sleek and modern appearance.
description_view_0: Side view showing the pronounced curvature of the screen and the depth of the monitor, with the angular stand visible at the base.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the wide, curved display, thin bezel, and the symmetrical V-shaped stand beneath the screen.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, again emphasizing the screen's curvature and the monitor's slim profile, with the stand partially visible.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the back panel and the full structure of the V-shaped stand, with no visible ports, buttons, or branding.
attribute_screen_bezel_design: The bezel is thin, black, and has a smooth, modern appearance with slightly rounded corners and no visible texture or decorative elements.
attribute_stand_type: V-shaped stand made of metallic material, angular and robust, providing stable support with a contemporary design; no visible adjustability features.
attribute_button_placement: No physical buttons or controls are visible on any side of the monitor.
